description: Single morning card from the daily-morning-digest orchestration that ties together today's meetings (with collapsible full briefs from the meeting-prep-brief output) and rolled-up summaries from every tracker (my-prs-tracker A3, meeting-action-items-followup A1, inbox-triage B5, waiting-on-tracker B4). Stable id `daily-digest-<YYYY-MM-DD>` so re-runs the same day update in place; the next day produces a fresh card. Always pinned. Tolerates missing tracker summaries by rendering 'tracker has not run yet today' in the affected section. Companion Obsidian note at `OrcStra/Daily/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md` provides a permanent markdown rendering of the same content. Single Microsoft To Do task per day with the LLM-synthesized top-3 focus.

contentTemplate.label: Header
contentTemplate.description: Two-line header with the digest date, weekday, and the count of meetings in the lookahead window.

contentTemplate.title: Today's focus
contentTemplate.description: LLM-synthesized 2-sentence 'Shape of the day' paragraph followed by a numbered list of THREE focus items. The Script wraps the synthesized markdown in a single `markdown` body inside this section; the body is injected from the synthesize-focus prompt step via the <<FULL_MARKDOWN:focus>> placeholder pattern.

contentTemplate.title: Today's meetings (<N>)
contentTemplate.description: When meetings exist: a table (Time / Title / Organizer / Attendees / Link) followed by one nested section per meeting with a Meeting keyValue (Organizer / Attendees / Meeting link / Brief file) and, when includeFullMeetingBriefs=true and a brief exists, a default-collapsed 'Full Brief' nested section embedding the markdown brief body via the <<FULL_MARKDOWN:meeting:<zakiraKey>>> placeholder. When zero meetings: a default-collapsed section with 'No meetings in the window. Focus time available.'

contentTemplate.title: PRs needing me
contentTemplate.description: Sourced from the my-prs-state:daily-summary Zakira record. When found: a keyValue with whatever count fields the tracker exposed (Open Count / Hot Count / etc.) and a 'Hot items' markdown bullet list with per-PR labels and open links. When absent: a polite 'my-prs-tracker has not produced a summary yet today' note.

contentTemplate.title: Action items
contentTemplate.description: Sourced from the action-items-ledger:daily-summary Zakira record. Same shape as PRs needing me.

contentTemplate.title: Inbox (needs action)
contentTemplate.description: Sourced from the triage-state:daily-summary Zakira record. Same shape.

contentTemplate.title: Waiting on
contentTemplate.description: Sourced from the waiting-on-ledger:daily-summary Zakira record. Same shape; hot items here surface urgent open asks with recipient + ask text.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form footer with the run id, forceSurface flag, and includeFullMeetingBriefs flag.

expectedActions.label: Open today's Obsidian note
expectedActions.description: Open the permanent daily-note rendering of the digest under OrcStra/Daily/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md.

expectedActions.label: Open Orchestra: Daily Focus list in To Do
expectedActions.description: Convenience link to the Microsoft To Do list this orchestration syncs the daily focus task into.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this card. Next day's run posts a fresh one under the new stable id.
